header.loginNotAvailable: Sign in is not yet available.

home.title: Manage policies with clarity
home.description: Create, review and maintain policies for data spaces, projects and partners.

orientation.title: Your next meaningful step
orientation.description: Start with a new policy or review existing rules before sharing data with partners.

empty.title: No policies yet
empty.description: Create your first policy to see it here.

policies.title: Policy Overview
policies.subtitle: All policies with category and policy type.

empty.title: No policies yet
empty.description: Create your first policy to clearly define data sharing and usage purposes.
empty.hint: Or start later from the overview

error.title: Policies could not be loaded
error.description: The overview is currently unavailable. Please try again or return to the home page.

policyDetail.alwaysTrue: This policy contains no constraints — it allows everything.

subtitle.create: Define a new policy with category, policy type and constraints.
subtitle.edit: Edit the policy and its constraints.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: Give the policy a meaningful name and a short description.

category.title: Category
category.description: Choose whether the policy governs access or usage of the data.

policyType.title: Policy type
policyType.description: Select the type of constraint for this policy.

alwaysTrue.title: No constraints
alwaysTrue.description: This policy allows any access or usage without further conditions.

membership.title: Active dataspace membership
membership.description: The consumer must be an active member of the dataspace.

useCase.hint: Select one or more use cases.

frameworkAgreement.label: Framework agreement
frameworkAgreement.hint: The data consumer must have agreed to this framework agreement.

ACCESS.label: Access Policy
ACCESS.description: Governs who is allowed to access the data.

CONTRACT.label: Contract Policy
CONTRACT.description: Governs under which conditions the data may be used.

ALWAYS_TRUE.label: Unrestricted
ALWAYS_TRUE.description: Allows any access or usage without conditions.

FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT.label: Framework agreement
FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT.description: Requires acceptance of the framework agreement.

MEMBERSHIP.label: Membership
MEMBERSHIP.legalText: [MOCK] The data consumer must be an active member of the dataspace.

USE_CASE.label: Use case
USE_CASE.legalText: [MOCK] Data usage is limited to the selected use cases.

END_DATE.label: End date
END_DATE.description: Validity ends on the given date.
END_DATE.legalText: [MOCK] The usage right expires on the given date.

FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT.label: Framework agreement
FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT.description: Acceptance of the framework agreement required.
FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT.legalText: [MOCK] The data consumer must have agreed to the DataExchangeGovernance framework agreement.

constraint.FRAMEWORK_AGREEMENT: with acceptance of the framework agreement "{{agreement}}"

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 200 characters
validation.useCaseRequired: At least one use case must be selected
validation.endDateInPast: End date must be in the future

deleteDialog.title: Delete policy
deleteDialog.messageBefore: Are you sure you want to delete the policy
